commands.review_summary:
This PR changes the README Homebrew cask install command from the custom tap to `brew install --cask codexbar`.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a docs-only install-command update, not a reported runtime bug. The command target was checked against the current Homebrew cask metadata and upstream PR state.
commands.review_followup: - No ClawSweeper repair lane is needed because the proposed patch is narrow, reviewable as-is, and has no blocking line-level defect.
commands.reason: comment version already processed in ledger

commands.author: steipete

target.title: Update Homebrew cask install command
target.body:
## Summary
- Update the README Homebrew cask command to use the official codexbar cask.

## Context
- Follows up on #293, which proposed the same README change.
- #293 was closed as already reflected in current main, but README still points to steipete/tap/codexbar for the macOS cask install command.

## Verification
- git diff --check

Docs-only change; build/tests not run.
target.author: ssakutaro

commands.reason: matching ClawSweeper response comment already exists

commands.author: SSakutaro
commands.command: @chatgpt-codex-connector i opened a homebrew/homebrew-cask pr to fix that here: https://github.com/homebrew/homebrew-cask/pull/266464 i also verified this on an intel mac: - `homebrew_no_install_from_api=1 brew install --cask codexbar` - `file /applications/codexbar.app/contents/macos/codexbar` - `file /applications/codexbar.app/contents/helpers/codexbarcli` - `brew uninstall --cask codexbar` both `codexbar` and `codexbarcli` are universal binaries with `x86_64` and `arm64` slices, so once the homebrew cask pr lands, `brew install --cask codexbar` should work for intel macs too.
commands.freeform_prompt: @chatgpt-codex-connector I opened a Homebrew/homebrew-cask PR to fix that here: https://github.com/Homebrew/homebrew-cask/pull/266464 I also verified this on an Intel Mac: - `HOMEBREW_NO_INSTALL_FROM_API=1 brew install --cask codexbar` - `file /Applications/CodexBar.app/Contents/MacOS/CodexBar` - `file /Applications/CodexBar.app/Contents/Helpers/CodexBarCLI` - `brew uninstall --cask codexbar` Both `CodexBar` and `CodexBarCLI` are universal binaries with `x86_64` and `arm64` slices, so once the Homebrew cask PR lands, `brew install --cask codexbar` should work for Intel Macs too.
